title: nf-core/autoseq pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

case_id.errorMessage: Case name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

sample_name.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

sample_type.errorMessage: Sample type must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

bam.errorMessage: Bam file path cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.bam'
